task_completion.description: Open the patient record for Ana Isabel Betz
task_completion.visual_evidence: GNU Health interface showing the patient record or dashboard for 'Ana Isabel Betz'.
A diagnosis entry in the patient's record showing an ICD-10 code starting with T45 or T65, or text indicating toxic effect/exposure to methotrexate.

task_completion.description: Perform a clinical evaluation documenting a normal baseline heart rate
task_completion.visual_evidence: A clinical evaluation or vital signs form showing a heart rate (bpm) entered in the normal range (typically 60-100).

task_completion.description: Order at least three baseline systemic toxicity labs
task_completion.visual_evidence: A laboratory request or order screen showing at least 3 distinct lab tests added for the patient.

task_completion.description: Prescribe a sterile irrigating solution for home use
task_completion.visual_evidence: A medication prescription or order containing 'Sodium Chloride', 'Saline', or 'Water'.

task_completion.description: Schedule a medical surveillance follow-up appointment for 3 to 7 days from today
task_completion.visual_evidence: An appointment scheduling screen showing a new appointment created for the patient with a date 3 to 7 days after the current system date.

integrity.description: Agent used the GNU Health GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the GNU Health graphical interface being used, rather than terminal commands, scripts, or direct database queries.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into the actual application forms
integrity.visual_evidence: Information is typed into the correct GNU Health fields, dropdowns, and forms, rather than being written in a separate text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: Agent did not use automated scripts to bypass UI interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory shows step-by-step navigation through menus, tabs, and windows typical of human interaction with the GNU Health client.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target patient is Ana Isabel Betz. Expected diagnosis codes are T45 or T65. Expected irrigation prescription must contain 'sodium', 'chlor', 'saline', or 'water'. The task strictly expects a minimum of 3 lab orders. The follow-up appointment must be scheduled between 3 and 7 days from the current date.
